content: {"question":"In randomized controlled trials of 16:8 time-restricted eating in humans, what are the documented dose-response effects on HOMA-IR, fasting glucose, and beta-hydroxybutyrate thresholds, and how do these correlate with AMPK activation and mTORC1 suppression markers?","search_queries":["16:8 time-restricted eating randomized controlled trial HOMA-IR fasting glucose","intermittent fasting AMPK mTORC1 phosphorylation human skeletal muscle biopsy","beta-hydroxybutyrate threshold ketogenesis 16 hour fast crossover trial","time-restricted feeding mitochondrial biogenesis PGC-1alpha human RCT","intermittent fasting insulin sensitivity dose-response meta-analysis 2024"],"perspective":"Scientific"}
